barks.text: Who takes MEMORIES? Tomatoes, I understand. Once, a whole crate of plums — a crime with flavor. But memories? Tragedia.
barks.speaker: gino

barks.text: Whoever it was, they knew the grind. You don't open a fifty-year vault like a first-timer pulls a shot. Smooth hands. That's all I'll say into a notebook.
barks.speaker: otto

barks.text: I've heard four theories before breakfast, pet, and I only served three tables. Write this down: nobody from Lanternside would take the whole heart of the place. Nobody who knew it.
barks.speaker: margie

barks.text: Official statement: the constabulary is pursuing the matter with all appropriate speed. Unofficial statement: same thing, minus the word appropriate.
barks.speaker: tuck

barks.text: Fifty years of people put something soft in a stone box and trusted the future with it. Find the person who couldn't wait for the future. That's your thief.
barks.speaker: evelyn
